commands_checked: cd pjp && rtk go test ./... -run Distributor -v
constraints: PJP module is Gin-based, not Fiber; do not bring fiber.Ctx into this work
Repository style is GORM; preserve existing GORM query patterns
Controller -> Service -> Repository layering is mandatory
All destination_data fields other than longitude/latitude are out of scope
Principal endpoint /scylla-pjp/v1/live-monitoring-principal is OUT of scope; pjp_principles schema differs
Multi-schema ARCHITECTURE rules apply; do not widen tenant scope
risks: Naive column swap (roh -> mst.m_outlet) may null coordinates if roh.outlet_id cannot join to mst.m_outlet (data drift)
Cast safety: mst.m_outlet.longitude/latitude is varchar(125); keep existing COALESCE/CAST to FLOAT pattern
Existing tests assert shapes, not coordinates; coordinate change is silent unless regression test added
Live test against Staging requires FE coordination; do not claim done before FE re-test

confirmed_vs_assumed.claim: arrive_* filled later from mobile.visits (not from main query)
pjp_data and extra_call_data share same query/model; split by is_extra_call
confirmed_vs_assumed.evidence: service transformDistributorRows:398 routes IsExtraCall rows to ExtraCallData

confirmed_vs_assumed.claim: Staging is env 1.0.0 (153) and creds adminbm@gmail.com / Admin123

confirmed_vs_assumed.evidence: ticket focused comment only targets distributor endpoint

confirmed_vs_assumed.claim: Live smoke can run on Staging with provided JWT
